Flow.description: Fire any automation on Task Creation or Edit

value.stringValue: ISNEW() && NOT(ISBLANK([Task].Related_to_Opportunity__c)) && [Task].Related_to_Opportunity__r.IsClosed =FALSE && NOT(CONTAINS([Task].Subject , "Days Before Renewal Email Sent"))

ISCHANGED([Task].Opp__c )
&& NOT(ISBLANK([Task].Related_to_Opportunity__c))
&& NOT(CONTAINS([Task].Subject, "Email: Clearvision Customer Service Team"))
&& (ISPICKVAL( [Task].Opp__c ,"30. Awaiting Signed Commercial Paperwork") || ISPICKVAL( [Task].Opp__c ,"25. Awaiting SOW Creation") || ISPICKVAL( [Task].Opp__c ,"20. Awaiting Proposal Completion") || ISPICKVAL( [Task].Opp__c ,"15. Awaiting Presales Completion") || ISPICKVAL( [Task].Opp__c ,"10. Awaiting Initial Briefing Completion"))

formulas.name: formula_myRule_18
formulas.expression:
ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Opp__c} )
&& NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_current.Related_to_Opportunity__c}))
&& NOT(CONTAINS({!myVariable_current.Subject}, "Email: Clearvision Customer Service Team"))
&& (ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Opp__c} ,"30. Awaiting Signed Commercial Paperwork") || ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Opp__c} ,"25. Awaiting SOW Creation") || ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Opp__c} ,"20. Awaiting Proposal Completion") || ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Opp__c} ,"15. Awaiting Presales Completion") || ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Opp__c} ,"10. Awaiting Initial Briefing Completion"))

value.stringValue:
ISCHANGED([Task].Opp__c )
&& NOT(ISBLANK([Task].Related_to_Opportunity__c))
&& NOT(CONTAINS([Task].Subject, "Email: Clearvision Customer Service Team"))
&& (ISPICKVAL( [Task].Opp__c ,"30. Awaiting Signed Commercial Paperwork") || ISPICKVAL( [Task].Opp__c ,"25. Awaiting SOW Creation") || ISPICKVAL( [Task].Opp__c ,"20. Awaiting Proposal Completion") || ISPICKVAL( [Task].Opp__c ,"15. Awaiting Presales Completion") || ISPICKVAL( [Task].Opp__c ,"10. Awaiting Initial Briefing Completion"))

formulas.name: formula_myRule_18_pmetrule
formulas.expression:
ISCHANGED({!myVariable_old.Opp__c} )
&& NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_old.Related_to_Opportunity__c}))
&& NOT(CONTAINS({!myVariable_old.Subject}, "Email: Clearvision Customer Service Team"))
&& (ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_old.Opp__c} ,"30. Awaiting Signed Commercial Paperwork") || ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_old.Opp__c} ,"25. Awaiting SOW Creation") || ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_old.Opp__c} ,"20. Awaiting Proposal Completion") || ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_old.Opp__c} ,"15. Awaiting Presales Completion") || ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_old.Opp__c} ,"10. Awaiting Initial Briefing Completion"))

value.stringValue: ISNEW() && NOT(ISBLANK([Task].Related_to_Opportunity_ID__c)) && NOT(CONTAINS([Task].Subject , "Days Before Renewal Email Sent"))&& NOT(CONTAINS([Task].Subject , "Sept 2021 disc change chaser Sent"))

formulas.name: formula_myRule_8
formulas.expression: ISNEW() && NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_current.Related_to_Opportunity_ID__c})) && NOT(CONTAINS({!myVariable_current.Subject} , "Days Before Renewal Email Sent"))&& NOT(CONTAINS({!myVariable_current.Subject} , "Sept 2021 disc change chaser Sent"))

Flow.label: Update Task (Create and Edit)
